text:
(screener response warrants an answer, but no response was given) 
.N = NA SURVEY OPTION (tailored skip) 
.R = REFUSED (possible only as a CATI response) 

agecat: Age category derived from SA_AGE 

SAS Format: AGE 

1: 18-24 

2: 25-34 

3: 35-44 

4: 45-54 

5: 55-64 

6: 65-69 

7: 70-74 

8: 75-79 

9: 80-84 

10: 85 OR OLDER 

ca_illasaw: RECODE : Last 6 mths, how often get care as soon as needed 

SAS Format: OFA 

1: NEVER 

2: SOMETIMES 

3: USUALLY 

4: ALWAYS 

ca_illness: RECODE :
